final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing profile avatar for a content creator covering new energy vehicles, digital products, and lifestyle recommendations.

Style/medium: needs a globally harmonious, culturally neutral aesthetic — references in the spirit of Apple product iconography, Muji minimalist branding, and Google Material Design; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be centered, suitable for circular crop across all social platforms
Subject: must include abstract or symbolic elements representing technology and lifestyle (avoid human figures, religious symbols, or culturally specific imagery)
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a clean, approachable, professional atmosphere — exact light treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a universally appealing direction — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a modern, polished surface treatment — exact finish is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must work harmoniously on both Chinese and international social platforms; must avoid imagery that could offend specific cultural, religious, or demographic groups
Avoid: must avoid human faces, national flags, religious symbols, political imagery, hand gestures, animal stereotypes, and color combinations with negative cultural associations
